name: madagascar
description: The Madagascar universe for Claude Code. Plugins that scaffold, document and maintain your project following Clean Code and SOLID.

plugins.name: skipper
plugins.description: 🐧 The captain. Complete framework: detects stack, applies opinionated profile, keeps living docs (ADRs/PRDs/plans), refactors with specialist subagents (architect, solid-coach, react-vite, react-native, nextjs, node-backend, supabase).
